name: Orchestrator Engine
description: System orchestration: Service trait and ServiceRegistry, StateMachine (Booting?Onboarding?Ready), SubsystemRegistry (Inactive?Dormant?Starting?Active?Failed), ToolRegistry gating, Watchdog (30s health monitor with restart), gating guards, init lifecycle, and onboarding flow.

dependencies.reason: Reads onboarding/tool state, persists subsystem state
